title: Project Setup & Database Schema
summary: Initialize Next.js App Router project, configure Vercel Postgres/SQLite, setup Prisma schema, and prepare seed script.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 15+ App Router is running. Prisma schema contains User, Property, TenantProfile, Payment, MaintenanceRequest, and Application models. Database can be migrated and seeded with an initial Admin user.

title: Manga Theme Styling & Reusable Components
summary: Configure Tailwind v4 with manga-style variables (halftone patterns, comic fonts, thick borders). Build base UI components.
acceptanceCriteria: globals.css includes manga-style utilities (halftones, custom fonts). MangaPanel, SpeechBubble, HalftoneBg, ActionText, and PropertyCard components are created, styled with thick black borders, and respond cleanly on mobile.

title: Authentication & Portal Layouts
summary: Implement simple session/cookie-based auth or NextAuth for ADMIN and TENANT roles. Create routing structure and layouts for public, admin, and tenant areas.
acceptanceCriteria: Unified /login page functions correctly. Middleware or layout checks enforce role-based access control (tenants cannot access /admin, public cannot access protected routes). Layout files are created with navigation.

title: Public Landing Page & Application Form
summary: Build the Manga-styled hero section, dynamic property listing grid, and tenant application form (/apply).
acceptanceCriteria: Public landing page (/) displays a dynamic hero section. Available properties are fetched from DB and displayed in a grid of PropertyCards. Prospective tenants can submit an application via /apply, saving it to the database.

title: Admin Property Management
summary: Implement Admin dashboard overview and property management features (CRUD), integrating Vercel Blob for property images.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard (/admin) shows key metrics. Admin can view, add, edit, and remove properties in /admin/properties. Property creation/editing supports image upload via Vercel Blob using Server Actions.

title: Admin Tenant & Application Management
summary: Allow Admins to review applications, approve tenants, create user accounts for them, and assign them to properties.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can view pending applications in /admin/tenants. Admin can approve applications to create a User (Role: TENANT) and TenantProfile. Admin can assign an approved tenant to an available property, updating property status to OCCUPIED.

title: Tenant Dashboard & Profile
summary: Build the Tenant dashboard showing lease overview, and the profile page allowing tenants to update contact details.
acceptanceCriteria: Tenant dashboard (/tenant) displays lease status, current balance, and recent notifications. Tenant can navigate to /tenant/profile to update phone and email. Profile updates persist to DB via Server Actions.

title: Rent Payments & Financial Tracking
summary: Implement mock rent payments for tenants and financial tracking for admins.
acceptanceCriteria: Tenant can view payment history and submit a mock rent payment in /tenant/rent. Payment submission updates tenant balance, creates a Payment record, and displays manga-style action text upon success. Admin can view a log of all payments in /admin/finance.

title: Maintenance Requests System
summary: Implement submission flow for tenants (with image uploads via Vercel Blob) and management interface for admins.
acceptanceCriteria: Tenant can submit a maintenance request with description and image upload at /tenant/maintenance. Admin views requests at /admin/maintenance, assigns them to staff/self, and updates status (OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED). Requests appear in speech bubble/panel styles.

title: Final Polish, Responsiveness & QA
summary: Review all pages for strict adherence to Manga styling, mobile responsiveness, and end-to-end functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: All manga panels reflow vertically on small screens. Fonts, borders, and halftones render with high contrast. Complete E2E flow (apply -> approve -> login -> pay rent -> request maintenance) works seamlessly without errors.
